title: E-Deck Gate Key Ring
description: Hanging on a numbered hook in the steward's office on F-Deck, a brass key ring labeled 'E-DECK FWD PROMENADE — THIRD CLASS SEPARATION' holds the padlock key for the gate currently trapping Third Class passengers below the boat deck. The hook is in plain sight on a board with twenty other key rings, but this one has been turned face-inward on its hook — a small, deliberate concealment.
